extract: Sneasel (Japanese: ニューラ Nyula) is a dual-type Dark/Ice Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Weavile when leveled up while holding a Razor Claw during the night. In Hisui, Sneasel has a dual-type Fighting/Poison regional form. It evolves into Sneasler when leveled up while holding a Razor Claw during the day. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
